tours.itinerarySummary: Arusha → Tarangire → Serengeti → Ngorongoro

dataQualityNotes.note: Founded 1981 by Judi Wineland and Rick Thomson, confirmed via company site. Real cancellation policy has 4 tiers: 91+ days before departure, only the deposit is forfeited; 90-61 days, 50% of package price is non-refundable; 60-46 days, 65% non-refundable; 45 days or less, 100% non-refundable. The deposit is described as a fixed amount rather than a published percentage, so refundPercent (80) is an estimate assuming a typical ~20% deposit, not a confirmed figure. All other fields are placeholders.

dataQualityNotes.note: Real policy (Independent Traveller terms): confirmation to 61 days pre-arrival, 30% deposit forfeited (70% refund); 60 days to arrival, 100% of booking value charged (no refund); cancellation during travel, 100% charged. Founded 1991, confirmed via company sources.

certifications: Kenya Association of Tour Operators (KATO) Bonded

dataQualityNotes.note: Established 1989 in Nairobi, confirmed via company sources; pioneered Kenya's conservancy model in 1997. Real cancellation policy: 25% charge from booking up to 120 days before the safari, 35% charge from 120-60 days before. The published terms retrieved this session didn't specify a fee for cancellations inside 60 days, so the figures inside that window are an estimate, not confirmed. All other fields are placeholders.

dataQualityNotes.note: Real policy: the Conservation, Community and Reserve Fee is always forfeited; 20% cancellation fee (deposit forfeit) from confirmation to 59 days before travel; 50% fee 58-30 days before; 100% fee 29 days or less before travel or no-shows. The company's founding year is commonly cited as 2016 (founders Colin Bell, Dave van Smeerdijk, Jennifer Lally and James Ramsay) but wasn't independently re-confirmed on an official 'About' page this session, so it's treated as a placeholder despite being widely reported.

Mapped imperfectly onto this 4-field schema — the 'Lifetime Deposit' concept (non-refundable but reusable on a future booking) isn't represented.

'Credit instead of cash refund' isn't representable in this schema, so refundPercent approximates the 31-55 day tier.

tours.itinerarySummary: Arusha → Tarangire National Park camp → game drives among baobabs

dataQualityNotes.note: DESTINATION NOTE: Tarangire National Park is not present in destination.json; destinationId/destinationName kept as original. Founded in 1983 by Firoz Ali Suleman (one source describes the company's foundation as 1982), confirmed via company sources. Real policy: cancelling less than 35 days before the safari start date incurs a 100% cancellation fee; cancelling more than 35 days before incurs a 30% fee, plus any third-party payments already made. This is a simpler two-tier policy than this schema's 4-field structure, so the 35-day figure is used for both refundDeadlineDays and noRefundAfterDays as an approximation.

tours.itinerarySummary: Cairo → Pyramids of Giza & Sphinx → Egyptian Museum → Saqqara & Memphis

dataQualityNotes.note: Licensed Egyptian tour operator since 1955, confirmed via company terms page. Real cancellation policy (most consistent version found): 15% charge from booking until 61 days before arrival, 35% charge 60-31 days before, 50% charge 30-15 days before, 100% charge 14-1 days before. Different Memphis Tours web pages show slightly different mid-tier percentages (e.g. 25% instead of 35% for the 60-31 day window), so treat the exact mid-tier numbers as approximate; the 15% (far-out) and 100% (last two weeks) tiers were consistent across all sources checked. operatorReviewCount (348) reflects a third-party aggregator's review count at time of search, not Memphis Tours' own published total.
